Book Private Tour
Abu Dhabi's Premier Boat Charter

Exclusive Private Boat Tours in Abu Dhabi

Craft your perfect day at sea. Explore majestic islands, enjoy customized BBQ lunches, experience thrilling water sports, or relax on pristine hidden beaches.

Book Your Escape Explore Packages

100% Private & Safe

Exclusive use of the boat for your group of up to 7 guests with certified captain.

All-Inclusive Pricing

Ice, water, fuel, safety gear, and specialized equipment included. No hidden fees.

Flexible Durations

Choose from crisp 2-hour coastal cruises to complete full-day sea safaris.

Tailored Experiences

Endless Ocean Adventures

Mix and match your favorite ocean activities to design an unforgettable bespoke sea itinerary.

Island Exploration

Cruise to serene locations like Salt Island or Al Maya to discover untouched coastlines and clear waters.

Leisure Fishing

Try your hand at premium light-tackle fishing. All rods, baits, and expert guidance are provided onboard.

Live BBQ Onboard

Savor a premium fresh live-barbecued meal cooked right on the boat's tailored deck while anchored at sea.

Banana Boat & Subwing

Feel the pure rush of adrenaline as you glide across waves with our high-speed premium watersport towables.

Sunset Cruises

Watch the legendary Arabian sun dip beneath the glittering cityscape skyline from your open deck views.

Island Beach Picnic

Anchor on private natural sandbanks and step ashore with luxury towels and shade setups.

24 FT Yamaha Luxury Edition
Elite Craftsmanship

Step Aboard Luxury

Our custom-built, modern 24ft Yamaha high-speed vessel perfectly blends high-octane sporting performance with absolute premium lounge comfort.

Equipped with expansive sunbeds, fresh deep cushions, full protective shade biminis, and a high-fidelity integrated sound system, it guarantees smooth navigation through Abu Dhabi's marine waters.

Capacity Max 7 Guests
Power Twin High-Output Engines
Audio Premium Bluetooth Setup
Amenities Onboard Deck Grill & Iceboxes
Reviews

Endorsed By Our Guests

Read unfiltered experiences shared by our global travelers.

★★★★★

"Absolute highlight of our holiday in Abu Dhabi! The private boat was exceptionally clean and premium. The host captain took us to an amazing sandbank where we grilled fresh fish. Strongly recommend the 4-hour charter!"

Sarah Jenkins

United Kingdom
★★★★★

"We booked the Full Day Safari for a family celebration. The Subwing watersport was incredible fun for the kids, and catching blue-fin groupers while cruising was an awesome memory. Worth every single AED!"

Ahmed Al-Mansoori

Abu Dhabi, UAE
★★★★★

"Exceeded all expectations. Booking via WhatsApp was simple and fast. The boat departs right out of Al Bateen easily, and watching the sunset away from the crowded public tours was spectacular."

Elena Rostova

Germany
